data.title: Crypto market rallies after Fed rate cut & altcoin ETF launches. Bitcoin $117,785.90, Ethereum $4,612.77, XRP $3.11, Dogecoin $0.2842, Shiba $0.00001353. 105,119 traders liquidated in 24 hrs for $336.51M, $51.3M outflows from BTC ETFs, $1.9M from ETH ETFs. Top gainers include ASTER, IMX, AVAX. Bitcoin up 2%, altcoin season roadmap outlined. Michael Saylor bullish on Bitcoin. Spot ETFs for Dogecoin, XRP introduced.
data.description: The cryptocurrency markets are on the rise following the Federal Reserve's rate cut and the introduction of new altcoin ETFs. The current prices for popular cryptocurrencies are as follows: Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) at $117,785.90, Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) at $4,612.77, Solana (CRYPTO: SOL) at $250.11, XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) at $3.11, Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) at $0.2842, and Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) at $0.00001353. Notable statistics indicate that 105,119 traders were liquidated in the last 24 hours, resulting in losses of $336.51 million. Moreover, there were net outflows of $51.3 million from spot Bitcoin ETFs and $1.9 million from spot Ethereum ETFs on Wednesday. In terms of top gainers over the past day, Aster (CRYPTO: ASTER), Immutable (CRYPTO: IMX), and Avalanche (CRYPTO: AVAX) saw significant increases. Key developments include a 2% rally in Bitcoin prices with an analyst's Q4 roadmap for Ethereum, Solana, and Dogecoin in the upcoming 'Altcoin Season.' Additionally, Michael Saylor emphasized Bitcoin as 'Digital Capital' reshaping the finance industry and encouraged ignoring critics. Insights on the Dogecoin and XRP Spot ETFs can be found on a full story on a reputable financial news platform.

data.title: Stock Market: Russell 2000 leads, Dow rises after jobless claims, Nvidia stock jumps on Intel stake. Darden hit.
data.description: The Dow Jones Industrial Average surged along with other indexes following an unexpected drop in weekly jobless claims. Nvidia's stock experienced a significant increase due to its stake in Intel. The Russell 2000 led the rally in the stock market today, with Cadence, Spotify, and TTM Tech showing potential for entries. However, Darden faced a setback.

data.title: New AI infrastructure provider WhiteFiber surges after Q2 report, shares jump on Thursday.
data.description: WhiteFiber, a recently listed company specializing in AI data center infrastructure, experienced a significant increase in its stock value on Thursday following the release of its Q2 financial results. The surge in shares indicated positive market reaction to the firm's performance during the quarter.

data.title: Billionaire David Tepper warns of overvalued market but stays due to the Fed cutting rates. NVDA stock rising.
data.description: Renowned billionaire investor David Tepper believes that stocks are significantly overvalued, but he continues to remain active in the market due to his golden rule of never going against the Federal Reserve. Despite his reservations, NVDA stock is currently experiencing an upward trend. Tepper disclosed to CNBC that his hedge fund, Appaloosa Management, holds a bullish outlook on the market solely because of the Fed's decision to lower interest rates. Tepper expressed concerns over high valuations in the market, labeling it as "frothy" with excess liquidity. For further details on this news, please refer to Benzinga.com.

data.title: Chainlink's impressive Q3 gains of 82% set the stage for a potential rally to $100-$125 fueled by a bullish cup-and-handle pattern.
data.description: The cryptocurrency LINK saw a significant increase of 82% in the third quarter. An optimistic cup-and-handle pattern indicates a potential surge in the price, with forecasts pointing towards a range between $100 and $125.
